def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # (open - close)
    oc_diff = pl.col('open') - pl.col('close')

    # delay((open - close), 1)
    delayed_oc = delay(oc_diff, periods=1)

    # correlation(delay((open - close), 1), close, 200)
    corr = rolling_corr(delayed_oc, pl.col('close'), window=200)

    # rank(correlation(...)) — cross-sectional rank per date
    rank_corr = rank(corr).over('date')

    # rank((open - close)) — cross-sectional rank per date
    rank_oc = rank(oc_diff).over('date')

    # Final factor: sum of the two ranks
    factor = rank_corr + rank_oc

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
